title: D-JRP22-WP2.3 Validation of Magnetic Capture Real-time PCR assay.
author: Davidson Rebecca
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This deliverable describes the work carried out to establish the Magnetic capture Realtime PCR assay for  Echicococcus multilocularis  in the different laboratories in the project, verification of the method at each laboratory and a subsequent proficiency test sent to all partners.
steps_raw: This deliverable describes the work carried out to establish the Magnetic capture Realtime PCR assay for  Echicococcus multilocularis  in the different laboratories in the project, verification of the method at each laboratory and a subsequent proficiency test sent to all partners.
keywords: MEME, Echinococcus multilocularis, detection method, Magnetic capture Realtime PCR
